title: Data adapter queries should not be built by string concatenation
messageFormat: Pass a parameterized command to this data adapter instead of a query built from concatenated or interpolated values.
summary: A data adapter constructed with a SQL string that is assembled from concatenation, interpolation, or string.Format carries the same injection risk as a raw command: the runtime values become part of the statement the adapter runs to fill or update a dataset.
Build the adapter from a command whose text is constant and whose runtime values are supplied as parameters.

seeAlso.text: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command
